popularStory.headline: History of Thomas de Mowbray (1366-1399)
popularStory.description: Thomas de Mowbray, 4th Earl of Norfolk, 2nd Earl of Nottingham, 8th Baron Segrave, 7th Baron Mowbray (17 September 1385[1] – 8 June 1405), English nobleman and rebel, was the son of Thomas de Mowbray, …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas de Mowbray 1st Duke of Norfolk於1366年3月22日出生在英國林可爾史爾艾普沃斯時，他的父親Sir John de Mowbray III25歲，母親Elizabeth Segrave27歲。他於1384年7月與Elizabeth FitzAlan在英國素可阿盧德爾 卡素結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他於1385年被列為lords marshal of england。他去世於1399年9月22日在義大利維圖維其亞享年33歲，埋葬在義大利維圖維其亞。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas de Mowbray 1st Duke of Norfolk于1366年3月22日出生在英国林可爾史爾艾普沃斯时，他的父亲Sir John de Mowbray III25岁，母亲Elizabeth Segrave27岁。他于1384年7月与Elizabeth FitzAlan在英国素可阿盧德爾 卡素结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他于1385年被列为lords marshal of england。他去世于1399年9月22日在意大利維圖維其亞享年33岁，埋葬在意大利維圖維其亞。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Mowbray
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northern; of Norman origin): habitational name from Montbray (Manche). Robert de Mowbray was Earl of Northumbria 1086–95, but was later imprisoned and deposed for rebelling against William II.

variants.name: Mulberry
meanings: English (Middlesex and Cambridgeshire): variant of   Mowbray  .
Irish (Derry): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Maoilbhearaigh ‘descendant of the devotee of (Saint) Bearach’.

variants.name: Mayberry
meanings: English: most probably an altered form of   Mowbray  . It is also found as   Maybury  , which has the form of an English habitational name. There is a place near Woking in Surrey so called; however, this is not recorded until 1885 and is probably derived from the surname. In England this surname is found mainly in the West Midlands; it has also spread into Wales. In Ireland this form is common in Ulster; MacLysaght records that it was taken there from England in the 17th century.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas de Mowbray 1st Duke of Norfolk was born on 22 March 1366, in Epworth, Lincolnshire, England, his father, Sir John de Mowbray III, was 25 and his mother, Elizabeth Segrave, was 27. He married Elizabeth FitzAlan in July 1384, in Arundel Castle, Sussex, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. In 1385, his occupation is listed as lords marshal of england. He died on 22 September 1399, in Venice, Veneto, Italy, at the age of 33, and was buried in Venice, Veneto, Italy.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas de Mowbray 1st Duke of Norfolk est né le 22 mars 1366, à Epworth, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir John de Mowbray III, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Segrave, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth FitzAlan en juillet 1384, à Arundel Castle, Sussex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. En 1385, sa profession de son indiquée est lords marshal of england. Il est décédé le 22 septembre 1399, à Venezia, Veneto, Italie, à l’âge de 33 ans, et a été enterré à Venezia, Veneto, Italie.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas de Mowbray 1st Duke of Norfolk am 22. März 1366 in Epworth, Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John de Mowbray III 25 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Segrave 27. Er hat im Juli 1384 in Arundel Castle, Sussex, England Elizabeth FitzAlan geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. 1385 ist sein Beruf als lords marshal of england aufgeführt. Er starb am 22. September 1399 im Alter von 33 Jahren in Venezia, Veneto, Italien und wurde in Venezia, Veneto, Italien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas de Mowbray 1st Duke of Norfolk è nato il il 22 marzo 1366 nel Epworth, Lincolnshire, England, il suo padre, Sir John de Mowbray III, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Segrave, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth FitzAlan nel luglio 1384, nel Arundel Castle, Sussex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Nel 1385, la sua occupazione è indicata come lords marshal of england. Morì il 22 settembre 1399, nel Venezia, Veneto, Italia, all'età di 33 anni, e fu sepolto a Venezia, Veneto, Italia.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas de Mowbray 1st Duke of Norfolkが1366年3月22日にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアエプウオルスで生まれた時，父Sir John de Mowbray IIIは25歳，母Elizabeth Segraveは27歳であった。1384年7月にイギリススセックスアルンデル カストルでElizabeth FitzAlanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。1385年，職業はlords marshal of englandと記録されている。彼は1399年9月22日にイタリアベンエトーベンエズアで33歳で死去し，イタリアベンエトーベンエズアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas de Mowbray 1st Duke of Norfolk(이)가 1366년 3월 22일 영국 링코실르 p워스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John de Mowbray III(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Segrave(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1384년 7월 영국 수세스 아런들 카스틀에서 Elizabeth FitzAlan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 1385년, 그의 직업은 lords marshal of england이었다. 그는 1399년 9월 22일 이탈리아 븐토 븐지아에서 33세의 나이로 사망했으며 이탈리아 븐토 븐지아에 묻혔다.

pt.22 March 1366–22 September 1399: 22 de março de 1366–22 de setembro de 1399
pt.from 22 March 1366 to 22 September 1399: de 22 de março de 1366 a 22 de setembro de 1399
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas de Mowbray 1st Duke of Norfolk nasceu em 22 de março de 1366, em Epworth, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John de Mowbray III, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Segrave, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth FitzAlan em julho de 1384, em Arundel Castle, Sussex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Em 1385, sua profissão aparece como lords marshal of england. Ele faleceu em 22 de setembro de 1399, em Venezia, Veneto, Itália, com 33 anos, e foi sepultado em Venezia, Veneto, Itália.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas de Mowbray 1st Duke of Norfolk родился 22 марта 1366 г. в местности эпворт, линколншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John de Mowbray III было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Segrave, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth FitzAlan июль 1384 г. в местности арундель кастл, суссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. В 1385 году он работал по профессии lords marshal of england. Он умер 22 сентября 1399 г. в местности винезя, винето, Италия в возрасте 33 лет и был похоронен в местности винезя, винето, Италия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Thomas de Mowbray 1st Duke of Norfolk nació el 22 de marzo de 1366, en Epworth, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John de Mowbray III, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Segrave, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Elizabeth FitzAlan en julio de 1384, en Arundel Castle, Sussex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. En 1385, su ocupación registrada era lords marshal of england. Murió el 22 de septiembre de 1399, en Venezia, Veneto, Italia, a la edad de 33 años, y fue sepultado en Venezia, Veneto, Italia.
